# Regionify

> Regionify is an in-browser choropleth map builder: import or generate regional data from CSV, Excel, JSON, or Google Sheets, then visualize it as a color-coded map without any coding or GIS software.

Core capabilities: fuzzy region-name matching (maps partial or approximate names automatically), AI-assisted data parsing and table generation, custom legends and color scales, animated time-series maps with a timeline scrubber, and export to PNG, SVG, JPEG, GIF, MP4, or PDF. Maps can be shared as responsive iframe embeds or separately hosted public pages. Pricing is one-time payment (no subscription) across the Observer (free), Explorer, and Chronographer tiers.

## Product

- [Home](https://regionify.pro/): Product overview, features, and pricing tiers.
- [About](https://regionify.pro/about): What Regionify is and who it's for.
- [FAQ](https://regionify.pro/faq): Supported data formats, export options, embedding maps, and badge tiers.
- [Contact](https://regionify.pro/contact): Get in touch with the Regionify team.

## Legal

- [Terms of Service](https://regionify.pro/terms): Rules and conditions governing use of the platform.
- [Privacy Policy](https://regionify.pro/privacy): How personal data is collected, used, and protected.
- [Refund Policy](https://regionify.pro/refund): Conditions for refunding one-time payments.

## Optional

- [Sitemap](https://regionify.pro/sitemap.xml): Full list of indexable pages, including country-specific marketing pages under /marketing.
